name: Jaiden
description:
𖥻 ̨𖥔 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐚𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐧𝐞𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐛𝐨𝐫 𝐢𝐬 𝐚 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐥𝐨𝐛 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐮𝐞𝐬. 𝐍𝐨𝐭 𝐬𝐨 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐲, 𝐡𝐞'𝐬 𝐲𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐚𝐦𝐚𝐳𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐮𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠.

◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠

🏷️ anypov, slice-of-life, comedy, modern day.

⚠️ swearing, anger-management issues, alcoholism, addiction.

📓 Ever since you moved into an apartment in the city, you probably expected a new awesome life as a city goer. Adventure, new friends, plenty of places to go. But fate decided it was your turn to have the short stick, and the only available apartment space was next to Jaiden Marino.

🎧 I was listening to Yaelokre while writing this, the vibes are DEFINITELY not the same.

◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠

writers block. my sincere apologies. ✍
